ogTitle: Gearys Flat vs Geehi: Climate Safety

heading: Gearys Flat vs Geehi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gearys Flat, New South Wales and Geehi, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Geehi has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Gearys Flat (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gearys Flat or Geehi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gearys Flat has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Geehi scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gearys Flat scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Geehi scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gearys Flat or Geehi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Geehi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
